hooks.command: MSG=$(jq -r ".message // empty" | tr -d "\""); [ -z "$MSG" ] && MSG="Claude Code needs your input"; osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Glass\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-tmux-flag" input
osascript -e "display notification \"Task finished — ready for you\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Glass\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-tmux-flag" done
